Why revenue teams love monday CRM?
"Sales and ops teams now manage thousands of leads and hundreds of custom-tailored deals monthly,
focusing on relationships and creating value."
Morri Chowaiki
Head of Sales and Partnerships
The Shark Group
"The AI email generator helps me communicate better.
The AI emails have a higher response rate since they are clearer and more objective in terms of the purpose of the message."
Fernanda Falcon
Account Manager
Inteli-k
"I use automated workflows and a custom dashboard to track remote teams and move jobs based on status updates -
improving productivity, visibility, and response times."
Naomi Williams
Administration & Systems Manager, IntoWork
"monday CRM’s AI streamlines repetitive tasks and ensures emails are polished and error-free. With the new Sequences feature,
my outreach strategy is more effective than ever.”
Juan Jose Zevallos
Head of Sales
CarbonWeb
One of my favorite features of Monday CRM's AI email generator is
its ability to craft personalized context-aware emails based on past interactions and customer data.

Director of Business Partnerships, ODUGlobal
Backed by 1000+ G2 customer reviews

Frequently Asked Questions
What is monday CRM?
monday CRM is an intuitive and flexible platform for revenue teams to manage sales pipelines and customer relationships from pre- to post-sale. It is easy to set up in minutes and fully customizable, helping teams organize leads, accounts, communication, tasks, and reporting in one place so everyone stays aligned. With simple-to-set-up automations that keep work moving and powerful AI capabilities that help you manage work and even do work for you, monday CRM supports teams at every stage of the customer lifecycle.New: monday campaigns lets you build, launch, and optimize on-brand email campaigns directly from your CRM.
What is a customer relationship management platform (CRM)?
Customer relationship management (CRM) is a system for managing interactions with leads and customers across their entire journey. monday CRM supports this by centralizing communication, data, and workflows in one place so teams can work together more effectively.
How is monday CRM better than other CRMs?
monday CRM adapts to your workflow, not the other way around. Traditional CRMs require admin work or developers to set up. monday CRM is:
Faster to implement: up and running in minutes
Easier to customize: no code, no hassle
Built for the full revenue cycle: from lead management to customer success
While conventional CRMs such as Salesforce or Zoho force you to adapt to them, monday CRM adapts to your workflow, and unlike HubSpot or Pipedrive, it supports both pre- and post-sales processes on one platform.
Why should I use CRM software for my business?
CRM software helps your business stay organized, improve communication, automate manual work, and increase sales performance. monday CRM supports this by bringing data, tasks, and customer information into one connected workspace.
How does monday CRM help my business performance?
monday CRM improves performance by streamlining your sales process, centralizing customer data, and giving teams real-time insights that support making better decisions. It reduces manual work and helps teams stay focused on revenue-generating activities.
Can I customize monday CRM for my workflow?
Yes, monday CRM is highly customizable with flexible boards, fields, views, automations, and dashboards that can match any sales or account management workflow. All of these changes can be made without the need for a developer or IT specialist.
Is monday CRM good for small teams or enterprises?
monday CRM is built for both small teams that need simplicity and for enterprise organizations that need scale. It supports lightweight processes, complex structures, advanced permissions, and cross-department collaboration.
What integrations does monday CRM support?
monday CRM integrates with tools like Outlook, Gmail, Slack, Zoom, Quickbooks, Google Workspace, Docusign, and hundreds more. Integrations help teams centralize work and communication, as well as automate workflows.
How much does monday CRM cost?
monday CRM offers multiple plans with different features for small teams, growing companies, and large organizations. Each plan includes core CRM tools, and all new users can start with a free trial to explore the platform before choosing a plan. Any plan purchased also includes a package of AI credits to use within the CRM suite.
Explore plans >
How does monday CRM help my business performance?
monday CRM includes AI built directly into the platform, helping you sell faster and smarter.AI features include:
AI Notetaker for call transcripts and summaries
Deal summaries & prioritization to spot hot or risky opportunities
Email drafting & workflow suggestions to save time
Data enrichment & health prediction to understand customer potential
AI Sales Agents that will source, qualify, and book meetings so you can focus on closing, not chasing.
The AI-native CRM your team will actually want to use
Free to start. No credit card needed.
Get Started

Go to homepage
Integrations & apps
Connect the tools you already use to work smarter
Discover 850+ integrations and apps to centralize work,
enhance collaboration, and drive better business results faster.
Get Started
Connectivity
Bring all your tools together
Integrate your favorite apps in seconds to create workflows for any need - bringing every team’s work into one place and keeping it perfectly aligned.
Get Started
Efficiency
Automate every workflow
Enable 2-way sync between monday products and any platform you work with to trigger automations, eliminate manual work, and keep your business in motion.
Get Started
Impact
Drive results with full visibility
Gain a real-time, cross-platform view that keeps data aligned and teams empowered — helping you make confident decisions and turn insight into measurable business impact.
Get Started
Integrations for every use case
Sales tracking
Customer support management
Code alignment
Team collaboration
Campaign optimization
Sales tracking
Close deals faster
Integrate Salesforce, Quickbooks, or HubSpot to manage leads, track opportunities, and keep your sales process proactive and results-driven.
Customer support management
Stay on top of every request
Connect Zendesk or Active Directory to manage your support tickets in monday.com, helping teams resolve issues faster and keep customers happy.
Code alignment
Keep development and delivery on track
Link pull requests from GitHub or GitLab directly to their related items in monday.com so teams can quickly access code and updates in context.
Team collaboration
Keep teams connected
Integrate your org’s communication tools - Slack, Gmail, Google Calendar, Outlook, Microsoft Teams, and more - to centralize communication and keep work flowing smoothly across channels.
Campaign optimization
Optimize campaign performance
Integrate Mailchimp, Intercom, or Google Ads to track campaign performance, refine strategies, and turn insights into growth.
“monday has all the functionalities and integrations we need without being unnecessarily complicated.”
Naomi M.
Head of Client Success
“monday.com's integrations with other software tools allow for seamless collaboration and project management across teams.”
Ray A.
Director of Customer Experience
“The integration available with Outlook has also helped ensure that important tasks received via emails are not missed and are completed within time.”
Jim M.
Real Estate Agent
Use your go-to AI assistants
Work with tools like Claude, Copilot, and ChatGPT through official integrations or the monday MCP, and keep data secure with trusted AI connectors.
Tailor your workflows with the monday marketplace
Enhance the monday.com experience with apps and integrations built by our trusted partners, helping you customize your workflow to your needs and add new functionality as you grow.
Explore the marketplace
Connect via no-code platforms
Easily connect monday.com to thousands of other tools with - no development needed.
Create a custom solution
Build your own integrations
Use our flexible APIs, SDKs to build custom apps and integrations tailored to your  unique needs.
Explore developer docs
Join as a marketplace partner
Turn your idea into monday app, reach 225,000+ customers, and grow your business on our marketplace.

analysis.name: Monday CRM
analysis.tagline: The only AI-first CRM your team will love
analysis.value_proposition: An AI-first CRM with code-free automations and intelligent workflows that lets sales teams grow revenue faster without needing IT or developers.
analysis.ideal_customer: Sales teams at SMBs and mid-market companies (professional services, real estate, software, media, financial services, healthcare, construction) that want a flexible, no-code CRM they can own without IT

features.name: ai sales agents
features.description: AI agents that source, qualify, and prioritize leads and book meetings 24/7 directly from the CRM
features.evidence_quote: AI sales agents source, qualify and prioritize leads, and even book the meetings for you, right from your CRM, 24/7.

features.name: ai notetaker
features.description: AI listens to sales calls, summarizes key points, suggests next steps, and drafts follow-up messages
features.evidence_quote: Notetaker keeps your team focused during meetings and turns conversations into actionable insights

features.name: ai assistant (sidekick)
features.description: Context-aware AI assistant that answers questions about pipeline, performance, team, or competitors
features.evidence_quote: Sidekick is an intelligent context-aware AI assistant that understands, connects, and runs your work

features.name: ai columns
features.description: AI-powered columns that run repetitive work automatically within boards; available Standard and above
features.evidence_quote: AI columns run your repetitive work directly within your boards, so you can focus on your main priorities

features.name: ai workflow builder
features.description: Orchestrates multi-step workflows connecting agents and AI across teams; available Pro and above
features.evidence_quote: AI workflow builder: Orchestrate workflows that connect agents and AI and watch work get done across every team

features.name: ai agent workforce
features.description: Fleet of AI agents that take on specialized tasks and support multiple functions at scale
features.evidence_quote: Agents take on specialized tasks and support multiple functions for automated execution at scale

features.name: automations
features.description: No-code automation of repetitive tasks; volume scales by tier (250/mo Standard, 25k/mo Pro, 250k/mo Enterprise)
features.evidence_quote: Save precious time by automating repetitive tasks in your boards.

features.name: integrations
features.description: 850+ native app integrations with action volume scaling by tier (250/mo Standard, 25k/mo Pro, 250k/mo Enterprise)
features.evidence_quote: Discover 850+ integrations and apps to centralize work, enhance collaboration, and drive better business results faster.

features.name: pipeline management
features.description: Visual deal pipeline with drag-and-drop stage editing and code-free process updates
features.evidence_quote: Simply drag and drop deals, edit stages, and update processes - no hassle or code required.

features.name: lead management
features.description: End-to-end lead tracking, assignment, and qualification within the CRM
features.evidence_quote: Lead management

features.name: sequences & mass emails
features.description: Send automated email sequences and mass emails to engage contacts across all journey stages
features.evidence_quote: Sequences & mass emails: Maximize engagement with every contact

features.name: reports & dashboards
features.description: Real-time customizable dashboards for rep performance, team targets, and pipeline visibility
features.evidence_quote: Monitor rep performance and your team's targets with easy-to-customize, real-time dashboards

features.name: revenue forecasting
features.description: Data-driven revenue forecasting based on pipeline state and historical performance
features.evidence_quote: Spot risks early, track team performance, and forecast revenue with accuracy.

features.name: risk detection
features.description: AI-powered early warning on deal risks, priorities, and changes before they escalate
features.evidence_quote: Spot every risk, priority, and sentiment before it's too late, so you can act fast and forecast with confidence.

features.name: sentiment tracking
features.description: Track deal and contact sentiment to proactively identify at-risk opportunities
features.evidence_quote: Spot every risk, priority, and sentiment before it's too late

features.name: activity logging
features.description: Automatically pulls data from calls, emails, and files to update CRM fields and log activities
features.evidence_quote: AI pulls data from calls, emails and files, updates fields and logs activities, auto-assigns reps and sets alerts.

features.name: auto rep assignment
features.description: Automatically assign leads and deals to sales reps based on rules
features.evidence_quote: AI pulls data from calls, emails and files, updates fields and logs activities, auto-assigns reps and sets alerts.

features.name: time tracking
features.description: Track and monitor time spent on each task or deal; available Pro and above
features.evidence_quote: Time tracking: Track and monitor the time spent on each task.

features.name: private boards and docs
features.description: Boards and docs visible only to owner and explicitly invited members; available Pro and above
features.evidence_quote: Private boards and docs are only visible to you and team members you invite.

features.name: guest access
features.description: External users limited to boards they are explicitly invited to; available Standard and above
features.evidence_quote: Guests are external users who can only access boards you invite then to, keeping the rest of your account private.

features.name: unlimited free viewers
features.description: Read-only seats with no editing rights at no additional cost; available Basic and above
features.evidence_quote: Unlimited free viewers: Viewers have read-only access to your account data, with no editing rights.

features.name: gantt view
features.description: Gantt chart view for schedule and dependency visualization; available Standard and above
features.evidence_quote: Visualize your work on a Gantt and calendar view to keep everything on schedule.

features.name: calendar view
features.description: Calendar view for date-based scheduling; available Standard and above
features.evidence_quote: Visualize your work on a Gantt and calendar view to keep everything on schedule.

features.name: kanban view
features.description: Kanban board view for visualizing work in progress stages
features.evidence_quote: Kanban

features.name: advanced board views
features.description: Charts, graphs, and diagram views for advanced data visualization; available Pro and above
features.evidence_quote: Visualize your data with different types of charts, graphs and diagrams.

features.name: portfolio management
features.description: Connect multiple projects to a unified portfolio with real-time visibility; Enterprise only
features.evidence_quote: Portfolio management: Connect projects to a unified portfolio with rea

features.name: workdocs
features.description: Collaborative documents with real-time co-editing and live board data embedding
features.evidence_quote: Create docs and collaborate with your team in real time.

features.name: forms
features.description: Data collection forms for capturing requests, feedback, and intake data
features.evidence_quote: Gather requests, feedback and data all in one place

features.name: mobile apps
features.description: Native iOS and Android apps for on-the-go CRM access
features.evidence_quote: iOS and Android apps: Stay connected on-the-go and access monday.com from your smart phone.

features.name: vibe apps
features.description: AI-assisted low-code builder to turn any business need into a published custom app; published app quota scales by tier
features.evidence_quote: Turn any business need into a custom business app in minutes

features.name: board templates
features.description: 200+ pre-built templates for various industries and use cases
features.evidence_quote: 200+ templates: Choose from over 200+ templates for every industry, and customize them to fit your team's needs.

features.name: column types
features.description: Configurable column types to structure board data; 8 on free, expanded set on paid tiers
features.evidence_quote: 8 column types: Build your board the way you want with a variety of column types.

features.name: advanced columns
features.description: Dynamic dependency columns and automated cross-board calculations; available Pro and above
features.evidence_quote: Leverage advanced columns to create dynamic dependencies between tasks and perform complex automated calculations

features.name: connect boards column
features.description: Column type that links and pulls data across different boards
features.evidence_quote: Connect Boards Column

features.name: formula column
features.description: Column type for formula-based calculations on board data
features.evidence_quote: Formula Column

features.name: dependencies
features.description: Task and item dependency tracking to sequence work and block downstream tasks
features.evidence_quote: Dependencies

features.name: user authentication
features.description: SSO and user authentication management for account security
features.evidence_quote: User authentication

features.name: roles & permissions
features.description: Admin controls for granular user roles, board permissions, and account governance
features.evidence_quote: Roles & permissions

features.name: enterprise security & governance
features.description: Enterprise-grade security features, compliance controls, and user management; Enterprise only
features.evidence_quote: Enterprise-grade security & governance: Get top-tier security features & user management controls.

features.name: enterprise-scale automations & integrations
features.description: Up to 250,000 automation and integration actions per month; Enterprise only
features.evidence_quote: Enterprise-scale automations & integrations: Up to 250,000 automation and integration actions per month.

features.name: app marketplace
features.description: Marketplace of 850+ apps and integrations from monday.com partners for workflow customization
features.evidence_quote: Enhance the monday.com experience with apps and integrations built by our trusted partners

features.name: monday mcp
features.description: Native MCP server allowing AI assistants (Claude, Copilot, ChatGPT) to securely interact with monday.com data
features.evidence_quote: Work with tools like Claude, Copilot, and ChatGPT through official integrations or the monday MCP

features.name: no-code customization
features.description: Build and adapt the full CRM without IT involvement or coding
features.evidence_quote: Build a customized CRM without IT, automate admin work, connect all your sales tools - no coding needed.

features.name: 2-way sync
features.description: Bidirectional data sync between monday and external platforms to trigger cross-tool automations
features.evidence_quote: Enable 2-way sync between monday products and any platform you work with to trigger automations

features.name: workcanvas
features.description: Digital whiteboard for visual collaboration and ideation
features.evidence_quote: Create and innovate on a digital whiteboard

features.name: crm academy
features.description: Structured learning resources including interactive courses, webinars, and videos for CRM onboarding
features.evidence_quote: CRM Academy

features.name: communication tools
features.description: Built-in communication features for team and contact interaction within the CRM context
features.evidence_quote: Communication

features.name: ai credits system
features.description: Credit-based consumption model for all AI features; credits pool scales by plan (1k–20k/mo)
features.evidence_quote: Use your AI credits for: AI agent workforce, AI meeting notetaker, Sidekick AI assistant

differentiators: Positioned as 'the only AI-first CRM your team will love'
AI sales agents that autonomously source, qualify, prioritize leads, and book meetings 24/7
Native MCP server (monday MCP) for AI assistant integrations
26X ROI from accurate data and consistent execution (claimed)
3,500+ hours saved by automating reporting and data entry (claimed)
Code-free customization — no IT or developer required at any point
Unified platform spanning work management, CRM, campaigns, dev, and service in one product family
AI credits bundled into every paid plan across all AI capabilities

praised: monday has all the functionalities and integrations we need without being unnecessarily complicated. — Naomi M., Head of Client Success
monday.com's integrations with other software tools allow for seamless collaboration and project management across teams. — Ray A., Director of Customer Experience
The integration available with Outlook has also helped ensure that important tasks received via emails are not missed and are completed within time. — Jim M., Real Estate Agent

free_tier.limits: up to 2 seats, 3 boards, 3 docs, 8 column types, no automations or integrations

tiers.name: Free
tiers.headline_inclusions: Up to 2 seats, 3 boards, 3 docs, 200+ templates, 8 column types, iOS/Android apps

tiers.name: Basic
tiers.headline_inclusions: Unlimited items + free viewers, 1,000 AI credits/mo, 1 vibe app; no automations or integrations

tiers.name: Standard
tiers.headline_inclusions: 250 automation+integration actions/mo, Gantt+calendar views, guest access, AI columns, 2,000 AI credits/mo, 2 vibe apps

tiers.name: Pro
tiers.headline_inclusions: 25,000 automation+integration actions/mo, private boards, time tracking, AI workflow builder, 3,000 AI credits/mo, 3 vibe apps

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.headline_inclusions: 250,000 automation+integration actions/mo, enterprise security & governance, portfolio management, 20,000 AI credits/mo, 5 vibe apps

pricing.notes: Prices shown are per seat per month billed annually; annual billing saves ~18% vs monthly. Pricing page defaults to 10-seat view — no stated seat minimum found but 10 is smallest selector. AI features across all paid plans draw from a shared monthly credit pool (1k/2k/3k/20k by tier). Changelog returned 404 so recent ships could not be verified. Time-limited promotional discounts ($10–$200 off/month) were visible on the pricing page at time of scrape.
